description: Template/runner resolution + .env rendering — finds template dir (user > builtin), loads template.toml, renders .env.example with {{placeholders}}, overlays user .env. runner.py is the V6 'runner merges global runners config with template'; template_loader.py is the legacy/simpler API still imported by CLI

key_classes_functions.name: _resolve_template_dir
key_classes_functions.purpose: Search user_template_dirs -> paths.templates_dir() -> built-in _BUILTIN_DIR; require template.toml

key_classes_functions.name: resolve_runner
key_classes_functions.purpose: Merge global_config[runners.<name>] with template dir assets; returns dict with command/args/template_dir/start_script/env_template/hooks

key_classes_functions.name: render_env
key_classes_functions.purpose: Render .env.example with placeholder_re = {{\w+}} → context; overlay template .env AND user_dir .env for built-in overrides

key_classes_functions.name: list_runners
key_classes_functions.purpose: List runners from global config + user dirs + builtin, dedup by name

key_classes_functions.name: render_env (template_loader)
key_classes_functions.purpose: Same placeholder rendering logic as runner.render_env

key_classes_functions.name: list_templates
key_classes_functions.purpose: List user + built-in templates with 'source' tag; used by `zchat template list`

public_interface: TemplateNotFoundError, resolve_template_dir, load_template, render_env, get_start_script, list_templates (template_loader.py)
